positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for positive.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u26,axiom,
    ~multiple_birth(luke)).

cnf(u29,axiom,
    ~live_with_strangers(luke)).

cnf(u22,negated_conjecture,
    ~spend_time_with_siblings(luke)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    ~multiple_birth(X0) | spend_time_with_siblings(X0)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~spend_time_with_siblings(X0) | live_at_home(X0)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    ~live_with_strangers(X0) | ~live_at_home(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define siblings_born_together(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define complain_about_siblings(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
